---
name: New Evaluation Rule
about: Propose a new CV evaluation rule (anti-pattern or positive pattern)
title: "[Rule] "
labels: rules, good first issue
assignees: ""
---

## Rule type

- [ ] Anti-pattern (something to flag/remove)
- [ ] Positive pattern (something to reward)

## Pattern name

e.g., "Objective statement at top of CV"

## Regex match (if applicable)

```
objective|career objective|professional summary
```

## Why this matters

Explain with evidence why this pattern helps or hurts a CV.

## Suggested fix (for anti-patterns)

What should the candidate do instead?

## Severity

- [ ] Critical (blocks getting past ATS)
- [ ] Major (significantly reduces chances)
- [ ] Minor (polish issue)

## Source

Link to research, recruiter advice, or data supporting this rule.
